channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: On his 40th, LeBron James says he could play "another 5 or 7 years." He won't stay around that long
item.description: LeBron James celebrated his 40th birthday by saying he could still play at an elite NBA level for another five to seven years if he wanted.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Dismal Man United loses again at home as Ipswich upsets Chelsea in Premier League
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Alexander Isak scored for the sixth straight Premier League game as Newcastle beat Manchester United 2-0 at Old Trafford on Monday to condemn Ruben Amorim’s side to its worst home run in the top tier since the 1970s.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NFL Playoff Guide: Postseason bracket much clearer with 1 week remaining in regular season
item.description: It's Week 18 of the NFL season, which means just one more weekend remains before postseason action begins. The two-time defending Super Bowl champion Kansas City Chiefs and star quarterback Patrick Mahomes look like a formidable opponent once again and have already clinched the No.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tennessee remains No. 1 following quiet week in AP Top 25, No. 15 UCLA climbs 7 spots
item.description: Tennessee remains No. 1 after a quiet holiday week in the AP Top 25. The Volunteers received 41 first-place votes from a 61-person media panel in The Associated Press men's college basketball poll released Monday. No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Auriemma ties VanDerveer for most appearances at one school in women's AP Top 25; UCLA remains No. 1
item.description: UConn coach Geno Auriemma has moved into a tie with Tara VanDerveer for the most appearances with a single team in the women’s AP Top 25.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Riley Leonard's passing game improvement key for Notre Dame in CFP quarterfinal against Georgia
item.description: SOUTH BEND, Ind. (AP) — When quarterback Riley Leonard transferred from Duke to Notre Dame for the 2024 season, he immediately went to work building chemistry with his new teammates. He brought six Fighting Irish receivers to his home in Fairhope, Ala.
item.dc:creator: CURT RALLO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bay Area sports rewind: Recounting the wild ride that was 2024
item.description: From the 49ers' Super Bowl heartbreak to San Jose State's volleyball firestorm to the death of baseball icons and the departure of the A's, the last 12 months have been eventful for Bay Area fans.
item.dc:creator: Evan Webeck, The Mercury News

item.title: JuJu Watkins scores 31 points to propel No. 4 Southern California past No. 23 Michigan 78-58
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — JuJu Watkins scored 31 points, making 13 of 14 free throws, and No. 4 Southern California beat No. 23 Michigan 78-58 on Sunday night in the Trojans’ Big Ten home opener. Watkins had five rebounds, seven assists, three steals and three blocks.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: All smiles as Djokovic and Kyrgios treat crowd to flashy shots in doubles win
item.description: BRISBANE, Australia (AP) — Exchanging smiles, laughs and flashy shots, Novak Djokovic and Nick Kyrgios teamed up in doubles on Monday as they both returned to the court in preparation for the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chip Kelly returns to the Rose Bowl, this time as Ohio State's offensive coordinator
item.description: Of all the things Chip Kelly is looking forward to in his return trip to Southern California, there is one that rises above everything else. “Gotta get more sunscreen looking at the weather report, because we haven’t seen the sun for a little while in Columbus," said Kelly with a wry smile.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Finland beats US 4-3 in OT in world junior hockey; Canada rebounds from loss to top Germany 3-0
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Tuomas Uronen scored at 1:46 of overtime to give Finland a 4-3 victory over the defending champion United States on Sunday in the world junior hockey championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dontae Walker, former Mississippi State star running back, dead at 44
item.description: Former Mississippi State Bulldogs running back Dontae Walker has died, the school announced on Saturday. He was 44. He ran for more than 1,800 yards in his collegiate career.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Saquon Barkley eclipses 2,000 rushing yards, joins elite company as Eagles clinch NFC East title
item.description: Eagles star running back Saquon Barkley broke 2,000 rushing yards on the season in the win over the Cowboys, making him the ninth player to ever eclipse that mark.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Penn State's polarizing QB Drew Allar puts critics on mute and keeps winning games
item.description: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Even when Penn State quarterback Drew Allar gets some praise, it's usually a backhanded compliment. They say he's a good game manager and stays within himself, or that he doesn't try to do too much. They mention he might not be flashy, but he gives the team a chance to win.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Clearwater Beach hosts ReliaQuest Bowl Beach Day
item.description: The ReliaQuest Bowl Beach Day on Clearwater Beach kicked off at 11 a.m. with the festivities. But fans started lining their beach chairs up for a close view of the action much earlier.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Brew, WFLA, NBC

item.title: USU beats San Diego State on last-second shot, 67-66
item.description: SAN DIEGO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State men’s basketball earned its first road win over a ranked opponent in over three decades Saturday afternoon in front of a sellout crowd at Viejas Arena, taking down No. 20 San Diego State 67-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mavs star Luka Doncic is latest pro athlete whose home was burglarized, business manager says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Luka Doncic of the Dallas Mavericks is the latest professional athlete whose home has been burglarized. The star guard's business manager told multiple media outlets Saturday there was a break-in at Doncic's home.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Lehkonen gets hat trick as Colorado beats Utah, 4-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's struggles on its home ice continue. Artturi Lehkonen scored his first NHL hat trick, and the Colorado Avalanche won 4-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Delta Center in Salt Lake City on Friday. Utah lost all three games on this current homestand.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Southern California overcomes 17-point deficit to beat Texas A&M 35-31 in Las Vegas Bowl
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The Southern California Trojans ended their season the way they started it. On Sept. 1 at Allegiant Stadium in the opener, the Trojans overcame a third-quarter deficit and scored with eight seconds left to beat LSU 27-20.
item.dc:creator: W.G. RAMIREZ, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Sportscasting icon Greg Gumbel dies at 78
item.description: Sportscaster Greg Gumbel, best known for his long career with CBS Sports, has died Friday, Dec. 27, according to CBS Sports and Gumbel's family.
item.dc:creator: Bill Disbrow, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Cathedral Catholic goalie shows why she's a keeper; honors her coach through art
item.description: Cathedral Catholic's 4-year starting goalie Maria'O Brien expresses her love to her head soccer coach through art. Suprising and touching longtime Cathedral Coach Dawn Lee.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: At least 65 million tune in for Netflix NFL Christmas Day games. NBA holiday ratings also skyrocket
item.description: LeBron James and the NBA are going to have make room for the NFL on Christmas. That shouldn't be a problem. Both leagues were winners on Wednesday. Netflix set records as the most-streamed NFL games in U.S. history while the NBA had its best holiday numbers in five years according to Nielsen.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY and TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Brock Bowers closing in on record held by Mike Ditka
item.description: Las Vegas Raiders tight end Brock Bowers is poised to break Mike Ditka's rookie tight end record of 1,076 yards receiving in Week 17, with only ten yards needed to do so.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: DIRECTV Holiday Bowl: What to know before going
item.description: It will be the first time the Holiday Bowl is held in Mission Valley — where it had been for more than 40 years — since before the pandemic. The two most recent bowl games were played in Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Beyoncé's performance highlighted Netflix's NFL debut on Christmas Day
item.description: Beyoncé provided more excitement than either game during Netflix’s NFL debut on Christmas Day. Riding into her halftime appearance on a white horse, the 32-time Grammy winner rocked her hometown Houston crowd with a nearly 13-minute performance on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks drop 2nd straight on road trip in 4-3 loss to Wild
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — Brock Faber snapped a tie in the third period, and the Minnesota Wild stopped a four-game losing streak by edging the Blackhawks, 4-3, on Monday night. Kirill Kaprizov, Jared Spurgeon and Marcus Foligno also scored for Minnesota.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
